fields.title: Add multi-user git and replay regression coverage
fields.description: Prove the event-sourced backlog design works for shared repositories and tau runtime integration.
fields.design: Add tests for event replay, same-issue concurrent updates, import from .beads, cache rebuilds, worker tool registration, mode-agent tool lists, footer counts, and backlog rendering. Include branch-merge-oriented fixtures where distinct changes add separate event files so shared-repo behavior is covered directly.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Tests cover replay from immutable event files into current state. Tests cover deterministic field-level last-write-wins on concurrent same-issue updates. Tests cover auto-import from .beads/issues.jsonl. Tests prove worker and mode prompts and tool registration use backlog. npm run gate passes in extensions/tau/.
